g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with follow-up GetGateway calls until the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
Move the gateway compartment before reconciling supported gateway drift.
Write the connection Secret only after the gateway reaches ACTIVE.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
upsert the owned Secret for the usable active resource
- Endpoint-topology drift remains outside the modeled update surface.
- Code and tests treat OCI DELETING as requeueing even though spec.cfg
only names CREATING and UPDATING as retryable.
- There is no Secret-delete branch for this controller.
